race.description: The Bullock Family Adam Lindsay Gordon Mdn Stpl
race.comment: ONGATITI (8) has developed a strong record over the jumps and arrives in excellent form after a victory at Sandown-Lakeside followed by another creditable placing at Warrnambool 2 weeks ago when needing the run. This is his first time over the bigger jumps, and he is the one to beat for us. MALBOROUGH BAY (3) resumes after a short spell, but has been kept ticking over with 3 jumping trials in that time off. He should relish adapting to steeplechasing for the first time, and he should not be underestimated. NASSAK DIAMOND (9) returned to hurdling last start and finished fourth in a strong 5-horse hurdle field last start after a solid flat performance for third at Bendigo before that. She is a dour type who is ready to win again at short notice. MUNGERANNIE (7) has been kept up to the mark on the flat, producing a sound second placing at Moe earlier this month, and he should be at his peak fitness back over the steeples. Stick with him on an each-way basis.
